summary: REAL Rust repo: pulldown-cmark @v0.10.3 (49 .rs files, CommonMark parser). A planted one-line bug in LineStart's tab-stop arithmetic makes tabs fixed-width instead of advancing to the next 4-column stop; 3 CommonMark spec-conformance tests fail. SEMANTIC GAP by design: the symptom speaks of tabs/indentation while the mechanism is unnamed arithmetic in scan_space_inner; grep 'tab' drowns in 'table' hits. Compiled language: no runtime-introspection bypass (the sympy task's python-inspect escape hatch doesn't exist). Validator = the repo's own spec suite + hardening (tests/ must be untouched).
